title: FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: DALLAS FOOD BANK FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shopping-style food pantry with a 3 to 5 day supply of food. Individuals may visit the pantry once per month and are encouraged to bring their own bags or boxes for transporting food items. Also has pet food. May be able to provide toilet paper, dish soap, laundry soap, and bath soap on a limited basis. Accepts donations of food and pet food. 322 Main Street Suite 180 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Must meet USDA income guidelines Hours: Pantry: Monday-Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-3pm, Wednesday/Friday 9am-11am Food Donations: Monday-Friday 9am-11am Email (503) 623-3578 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-3578 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Food Pantries Pet Food If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DALLAS FOOD BANK
